tbl_faq.faqQuestion: What is the mileage of Honda City?
tbl_faq.faqAnswer:
Honda City Petrol: 17.77 km/l (MT) and 17.97 km/l (CVT).
Honda City e:HEV: 27.26 km/l.

tbl_faq.faqQuestion: What are the colours available in the Honda City?
tbl_faq.faqAnswer: Honda City Petrol and Honda City e:HEV are available in Radiant Red Metallic, Lunar Silver Metallic, Platinum White Pearl, Crystal Black Pearl, Obsidian Blue Pearl and Meteoroid Gray Metallic.

tbl_faq.faqQuestion: What are the safety features available in the Honda City?
tbl_faq.faqAnswer:
Honda City Petrol: Active and passive advanced safety features including Honda SENSING Intelligent ADAS technology with Collision Mitigation Braking System (CMBS), Road Departure Mitigation System, Lane Keep Assist System (LKAS), Lead Car Departure Notification System and Auto High-Beam.
Honda City e:HEV: Active and passive advanced safety features including Honda SENSING Intelligent ADAS technology with Collision Mitigation Braking System (CMBS), Adaptive Cruise Control with Low-Speed Follow, Road Departure Mitigation System, Lane Keep Assist System (LKAS), Lead Car Departure Notification System and Auto High-Beam.

tbl_faq.faqQuestion: What is the transmission type of Honda City?
tbl_faq.faqAnswer: Honda City Petrol: Available with a 6-speed Manual Transmission and CVT Automatic Transmission with D (Drive), S (Sports), and SM (Sequential Shift Sports) drive modes along with ECON mode. Honda City e:HEV: Comes with an advanced e-CVT automatic transmission with Engine-Linked Clutch technology and offers D (Drive) and B (Brake) drive modes with automatic switching between EV Drive, Hybrid Drive, and Engine Drive modes.

tbl_faq.faqQuestion: What is the fuel tank capacity of Honda City?
tbl_faq.faqAnswer: Honda City Petrol: 40 litres. Honda City e:HEV: 40 litres.

tbl_faq.faqQuestion: What are the engine specifications of Honda City?
tbl_faq.faqAnswer:
Honda City Petrol: Powered by a Pure Petrol 1.5L i-VTEC DOHC engine with VTC paired with a 6-speed MT or 7-speed CVT, delivering Max Power of 121 PS @ 6600 rpm and Max Torque of 145 Nm @ 4300 rpm. It offers fuel efficiency of 17.77 km/l for MT and 17.97 km/l for CVT.
Honda City e:HEV: Powered by Honda’s original Self-charging Two Motor Strong Hybrid e:HEV system with e-CVT delivering Combined Max Power of 126 PS, Max Torque of 253 Nm @ 0–3000 rpm and fuel efficiency of 27.26 km/l, while seamlessly switching between EV, Hybrid and Engine drive modes.

tbl_faq.faqQuestion: What are the variants of Honda City?
tbl_faq.faqAnswer:
Honda City Petrol: Available in SV, V, ZX and ZX+ grades in MT and V, ZX and ZX+ grades in CVT.
Honda City e:HEV: Available in ZX+ grade.

termsConditionData: Terms & Conditions apply.
~Ex-Showroom price, New Delhi.
*As certified under Rule 115 of CMVR 1989, rounded to 2 decimal digits
Colours, features, variants, and specifications are grade specific and subject to change without prior notice.
Images, depictions, and creative visualizations are illustrative/computer generated and may differ from the actual product.
Actual colours, accessories, applications, and features shown may not be part of standard fitment.
Honda Connect comes with free subscription for 1st 3 years from date of purchase.
Honda Connect application works on Android 7.0 & above and iOS 11.0 & above.
Smartphone connectivity depends on device compatibility and configuration.
Honda Connect supports select smartwatch devices only.
Smartwatch and Alexa-enabled devices are not part of standard accessories/giveaways and must be purchased separately.
Honda Connect services/features are subject to network availability, transmission limitations, regional regulations, and permissions.
Select alerts and connected features work only on select models/transmissions and based on user settings.
Digital Pick & Drop and tracking services depend on dealer participation and network conditions.
O10-YEAR Anytime Warranty is extendable up to the maximum age of 10 years/1 20 000 kilometres by renewing every year and is applicable from the date of purchase of car.
¢Whichever is earlier from the date of first sale of new car. For details refer to Owner's Manual, Warranty Booklet or Extended Warranty Document.
TPMS, DVR, and Wireless Charger are optional accessories/add-ons fitted by dealers at extra cost.
Optional Honda Accessories carry a limited 1-year warranty from purchase date.
Leather refers to a mix of genuine and synthetic leather.
Honda SENSING is Honda's exclusive Advanced Driver Assist System (ADAS).
Honda SENSING cannot substitute human acumen and vigilance while driving. Honda Cars India Limited urges drivers to follow traffic rules which are meant to keep them safe on roads
Android Auto™, Apple CarPlay®, Amazon, and Alexa are registered trademarks of their respective owners.
Customers should confirm availability of variants, colours, and features with authorized dealerships.
For more information, visit authorized Honda dealerships or Honda Cars India.
